name: judicial_technology_satellite_derived_harbor_lib_eq
premise: A Judicial Technology response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving judicial technology satellite derived harbor lib eq. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before markets open. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as liberty vs equality under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Marco Berg
agents.identity: I am Marco Berg, accountable for a defensible call in Judicial Technology when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays equality for liberty.

agents.name: Nadia Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Nadia Vasquez, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Judicial Technology.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so equality isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of liberty.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect equality.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before markets open. Evidence is partial. Marco Berg must decide under liberty vs equality. What does Marco Berg do?
